reviews.title: A great location let down by poor room maintenance and an unacceptable smell.
reviews.positives: The location of the hotel was very convenient and suited my travel plans perfectly. It was easy to get around the city from here.
reviews.negatives: Unfortunately, the room condition was disappointing. It had a strong, unpleasant musty smell. Despite reporting the issue and requesting a room change, the problem was not resolved.

reviews.title: Twilight Zone Hotel
reviews.text: This was pretty scarey hotel. The safe can be lifted out. ii took a photo of t on the bed. the furniture started falliing apart, you could see where they tried repair multiple times, i went to the western restaurant on the 3rd floor, when the elevator opened it looked like it was closed for many years... I went to the 1st floor restaurant and there was no other guets there, i moved to the bar, when i walked in they turned the lights on.I went out for Dinner... For Breakfast, there was a huge line of ants on the fruit/bread/muffin table. When I sat down to eat my breakfast all the table cloths looked to be soiled and dirty... like they had not been washed for over 30 days. Wow, so scarey.

reviews.title: service and hotel location
reviews.text: there' s only a half used toilet paper inside the room by the time I checked in. Air-con was not working till I called them and wait for another 20 minutes for them to check and repair it. Location is not good, most of the local restaurants are opposite the hotel but there is no way to across the road due to many fast driving cars and motorbikes. Neither zebra crossing nor traffic light were found nearby. Yesterday morning around 10:00 the cleaning staff knocked the door, instead of waiting some minutes for the guest to open the door but they just opened the door by themselves, luckily I was not naked. I didn't hang the room cleaning tag outside the room and don't understand why they came to clean room so early.

reviews.title: Hotel Review
reviews.text:
Room itself is ok but these are my concerns.
1. AC is not working. Called a staff (1st staff) and he just reset the buttons and said to wait 5mins but after 5mins, still not working properly. And the staff who check the AC looks always in hurry.. Called again staff after few hours, it seems AC is being controlled from outside.. I fell asleep already and woke up with sweat!!!!! Weather outside is colder but there is no window to open. 2nd staff came and told me that the room is cold already but for me its not. The staff also told me that the AC is centralize meaning if the other of other rooms wants hot they can switch to hot and my room will automatically change to heating as well. OMG is this Sauna? Facility is not good, I will never come back here again.
2. When I arrive, line to use the elevator is long and some of the elevator is not working
3. This hotel is 4-star hotel but no bath rob, TV is not smart

reviews.text:
The hotel is decent. The value for money, well, so-so as HN Hotels go. The breakfast was not good and the staff rarely replenish the food. Sometimes there were no glasses, so no juice.
It's all tolerable but there is a receptionist lady who is a terror. She will not help even if you are at the point of death. I needed a simple form filled out for the security services but she refused which created a big problem for me. Eventually a staff member stepped in and helped, saying she "don't understand."
I have stayed at other MT hotels in Vietnam and none was like this one.
They boast "Largest Hotel Chain" in Asia. But they need to work on training their staff and the service quality.

reviews.text:
I stayed at the hotel for about a week and had a very good experience. I observed that the staff, especially the young ones, worked very attentively, enthusiastically, always maintained a cheerful attitude, and proactively sought the best solutions to assist customers. A special thanks to the thinnest male staff member and the beautiful female staff member at the reception.

During my stay, the hotel was undergoing upgrades and maintenance, so there were some minor inconveniences such as repairs or dealing with water leaks. However, overall, the hotel was newly renovated and regularly maintained, so the quality of the facilities was still very good.

I encourage everyone to book a room here. Although the location is a bit far from the center, the clean, comfortable space, good service, and the dedicated support from the staff make the stay truly worthwhile.

reviews.title: Wonderful holiday at Mường Thanh Linh Đàm
reviews.text:
Mường Thanh Linh Đàm Hotel has given me a wonderful and unforgettable experience. In particular, I would like to express my deep appreciation to the excellent staff here.

Bell has always been enthusiastic and attentive in guiding and assisting customers. Minh, Trang, and Quân have demonstrated professionalism and friendliness, always ready to meet all my requests.

Receptionists Khánh, Trang, and An are very dedicated and always wear bright smiles, creating a welcoming atmosphere from the moment I stepped into the hotel and ready to instantaneously handle all my requests throughout my stay.

Yến and Loan from the restaurant not only served delicious food but also provided enthusiastic, very friendly, and attentive service. I truly appreciate their care and concern for customers.

I will definitely return to Mường Thanh Linh Đàm next time and will recommend this hotel to my friends and family. Thank you to the entire staff for making my vacation more wonderful than ever.

Nghe Mường Thanh nên mình rất yên tâm và chấp nhận đặt phòng với giá khá cao để trải nghiệm dịch vụ. Nhưng nhận được thất vọng.

2. Nhận phòng mở cửa ra thì xộc mùi hôi phòng như nhà nghỉ dạng bình dân vậy
3. Mình hi vọng nhất ở buffet sáng nhưng k có gì đặc biệt, các món rất sơ sài, k đúng với cái danh Mường Thanh
Với 1tr5/đêm thì nên chi ở chỗ khác hơn.
Khuyên chân thành mn k nên ở đây vì phí tiền mà giá trị nhận lại không tương xứng

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Tôi đã có 1 trải nghiệm không ưng ý. Tôi lưu trú đúng thời điểm sửa chữa của khách sạn. Tầng cao nhất có vẻ vừa sửa hay vừa đưa vào sử dụng mà còn mùi rất nồng, bụi mịn khắp sàn và cả trên giường làm tôi ngứa hết cả người. Ban ngày thì tháo bảng quảng cáo hay sửa bồn chứa nước mà đập rầm rầm liên tục, không thể ở lại nổi trong phòng. 
Hành lang thì đầy vật dụng thải ra và vận chuyển chung thang với khách. 
2 thang máy lên được tầng 20 thì độc lập nhưng lại kết nối với 2 thang máy khác, do đó lúc ở tầng trệt muốn lên phòng là phải chờ thang kia xuống xong, vào bấm tầng cho nó chạy lên thì mới kêu thang lên được tầng 20 xuống mà đi. Nightmare.
Chưa kể thái độ nhân viên rất kì cục. Ban đầu chưa biết cách kéo thang như thế, hỏi lễ tân thì được bảo là sẽ có nhân viên trực để bấm thang cho khách. Nhưng sau đó, lúc nhờ nhân viên gần đó bấm thì nhân viên đó khó chịu bảo rằng “thì chị cứ vào bấm thôi, có gì đâu, đi vào thang này bấm cho nó lên rồi ra bấm gọi thang lên lại là thang kia xuống”. Là tự khách phải biết cách mà bấm hay sao ah???
Nói chung là thái độ tệ.
